Held-for-sale assets are not total current assets.

candidates.row_label: Liabilities related to non-current assets held for sale
candidates.why: Liability line, not an asset line.

variables.notes: No clear total current assets line is visible on the Balance Sheet preview; this appears to be a financial/insurance-format statement without a reported current-assets subtotal.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred for CHE over cash-flow statement beginning/end balances.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of reporting period
candidates.why: Semantically cash and cash equivalents, but cash-flow sheet is secondary to balance-sheet presentation for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of reporting period
candidates.why: Cash amount but for prior-period opening balance, not preferred.
Candidate provided, but explicitly non-current and not total current liabilities.

variables.notes: No clear total current liabilities line is visible on the Balance Sheet preview; this statement format does not appear to present a current-liabilities subtotal.
No clear short-term debt/current borrowings/current maturities line is visible. Available debt labels appear total or non-current/mixed, and lease-related rows are excluded by rule.

candidates.why: Best visible taxes-payable/current tax liability style row. More informative than the blank 'Income Taxes Payable' line.
Direct semantic match in candidate list, but preview values are blank and the populated tax-liability row appears to be the active reported label.
Also semantically relevant, but preview values are blank and less preferred than the populated all-segments tax liability line.

variables.notes: Prioritized the populated tax-payable style line. Included 'Income Taxes Payable' as secondary label because labels can change over time and it is an exact semantic match.

candidates.why: Exact PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred total/net PPE label.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Tangible fixed assets but lease-related and not preferred over reported PPE total.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant and Equipment - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/subtotal line, not preferred when clean PPE line exists.
Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.
Exact net operating cash flow line; preferred for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from/used in operating activities
